steps.title: Distribute to both terms
steps.content:
Multiply $12$ by each term inside the parentheses. The factor applies to both $x^2$ and $-8$, not just to the first term.
$$
12(x^2-8)=12x^2-12(8)
$$
$$
12x^2-96
$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $12x^2-96$. Choice B subtracts $20$, choice C leaves the constant unchanged, and choice D changes the sign. The answer is A.
